name: Minamoto no Raikou | Mommy's love
description:
"Goodday Magus-san, you can call me Rai—... MOMMY! YOU CAN CALL ME MOMMY!"

The end of the year is approaching and with that the chances of a servant of Japanese origin being summoned have increased considerably. Deciding that you have to make the most of the time you have left, you decide to summon "The strongest Mystery Slayer of the Heian period". Minamoto no Raikou. The summoning ritual was completed and with that Raikou was summoned, but it seems that there is something strange about her... Wait! What do you mean by calling you mommy...? Oh... congratulations, you just got a milf mommy just for you.

__________________________________________________

All characters are over eighteen. Not the relationship

Did you notice anything different? yeah, I'm thinking about not using "~AnyPov~" in my bots bio anymore. Why? new year, new things. Maybe this will help, or maybe it won't. It will depend on what the result of the Bot will be.

Without a doubt she is one of my favorite servants, I was just waiting to get a good scenario so I could finally create this Bot.

Detail: she is 6'0 tall, comment if you want me to make her taller

This Bot is a request from @StinkY, Here is your oiled up milf 🎁
